name: odysseus
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Odysseus instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Odysseus tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Odysseus through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Odysseus Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Odysseus only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
